ip_outcome_note: PokemonTCG.io API confirms card ID sm1-39, name 'Popplio', nationalPokedexNumbers [728]. Popplio is a canonical Game Freak / Nintendo creature (not an external third-party IP). Verification is confirmation of canonical identity, not an external crossover risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Popplio (National Pokedex no. 728) is the Water-type First Partner Pokemon of the Alola region, introduced in Pokemon Sun & Moon (2016). It evolves into Brionne (level 17) then Primarina (level 34), which is Water/Fairy-type. Its evolution line is the only Alola starter line that gains a second type on final evolution with Fairy. [PokemonTCG.io API sm1-39; pokemondb.net via WebSearch snippet]
Flavor text (this print): "This Pokemon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It's famous for being a hard worker." [PokemonTCG.io API sm1-39]

Community sentiment: Popplio was the least popular Alola starter at reveal in 2016 — a Twitter poll by The Pokemon Company International gave it only 21% of the vote, finishing last behind Rowlet and Litten. Design criticisms focused on its clown-like appearance and perceived femininity. It acquired a 'Popplio Defense Squad' of supporters online and its final evolution Primarina rehabilitated its reputation significantly. Game Freak developers acknowledged the backlash in a 2016 interview. [Kotaku: 'Pour One Out For Popplio' 2016; nintendoeverything.com devs interview via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Kotaku: Pour One Out For Popplio (2016) (via WebSearch snippet)
nintendoeverything.com: Pokemon Sun/Moon devs on Popplio backlash (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: This Sun & Moon base set print (sm1) was released February 3, 2017. Artist is Kouki Saitou. Card no. 39 in a set of 149 printed cards. HP 70, Grass weakness x2, 1 Colorless retreat cost. [PokemonTCG.io API sm1-39]
